title: eria oblonga
intro: Eria oblonga is a type of flowering plant, also known as the "Himachel orchid" or "Nilgiri orchid," native to the Himalayan region. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurveda, for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eria oblonga include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Eria oblonga is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create various formulations, including powders and capsules.
